data.body:
Goal:
`brew install cartine/thimble/thimble`. Most macOS operators install
everything via brew; not having it here means most people fall back to
`curl|sh`, which is the path we want them off.

Verification:
1. A `homebrew-thimble` repo exists with a `Formula/thimble.rb`.
2. Release workflow updates the formula on each release with the new version and SHA-256s for darwin/amd64 and darwin/arm64.
3. `brew install cartine/thimble/thimble` works on a clean macOS image and produces a binary that passes `thimble --version`.
4. README "Install" section adds the brew one-liner above the curl one.

Constraints:
- Knot ref: K-42; wave/step 7.5; effort M; risk low
- Files: separate tap repo (`homebrew-thimble`), .github/workflows/release.yml
- Depends on: K-40
- Notes: Doable as a tap from day one. Homebrew core requires a track record we
don't have yet — revisit in 6 months.
data.title: Distribution: Homebrew tap
